flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rockhurst University rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.9k → $25.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Rockhurst University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rockhurst University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($40.5k → $45.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rockhurst University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
